item.title: Version 0.3
item.description:
✨ New Features

  • PDF Info sidebar with five panels — Info (Document Info, PDF/X, PDF/A, PDF/UA, Security, Pages, Features), Fonts (CGPDFDocument scan walking inherited page resources and Form XObjects), XMP (raw packet parsed into sections), Bookmarks (click-to-navigate), and Annotations (click-to-navigate, Cmd+C copies content)
  • View menu shortcuts: PDF Info (Cmd+I), PDF Bookmarks (Cmd+B), PDF Annotations (Cmd+N)
  • Export PDF Info as Markdown or JSON via File ▸ Export ▸ … (All / Info / Fonts / XMP / Bookmarks / Annotations) and the in-panel Export dropdown
  • Main window position and size are now persisted across launches

item.title: Version 0.2
item.description:
✨ New Features

  • Sparkle 2 auto-update support ("Check for Updates..." menu)
  • Daily automatic update checks against the stable appcast
  • Marquee selection UX improvements in PDF view
  • Debug logging via os_log with subsystem filtering
  • Generation token guard against race conditions on PDF reload

🛠 Improvements

  • Refined page input HUD behavior
